description: Compare domain architectures of ACD6 vs A0A804UIX9 and analyze the 6-TM topology significance
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 6))

# ACD6 (Q8LPS2) - 670 aa
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 700)
ax1.set_ylim(-1, 3)
ax1.set_title('ACD6 (Q8LPS2) - Arabidopsis thaliana - 670 aa', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Background bar
ax1.barh(1, 670, height=0.5, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)

# Ankyrin repeats region (~100-450)
ax1.barh(1, 350, left=100, height=0.5, color='#4CAF50', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax1.text(275, 1, 'Ankyrin repeats\n(PF12796)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)

# TM helices
tm_acd6 = [(457,477), (493,513), (538,558), (578,598), (603,623), (639,659)]
for i, (s, e) in enumerate(tm_acd6):
    ax1.barh(1, e-s, left=s, height=0.5, color='#FF5722', alpha=0.9, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    ax1.text((s+e)/2, 0.3, f'TM{i+1}', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6, rotation=90)

# PGG domain region (within TM region)
ax1.barh(2.2, 200, left=450, height=0.3, color='#2196F3', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='blue')
ax1.text(550, 2.2, 'PGG domain (PF13962)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='blue')

ax1.set_yticks([])
ax1.set_xlabel('')

# A0A804UIX9 - 375 aa
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 700)
ax2.set_ylim(-1, 3)
ax2.set_title('A0A804UIX9 - Zea mays - 375 aa', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Background bar
ax2.barh(1, 375, height=0.5, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)

# Disordered N-term
ax2.barh(1, 44, left=0, height=0.5, color='#FFE0B2', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(22, 1, 'Disordered\nN-term', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)

# TM helices
tm_maize = [(54,73), (102,123), (135,154), (166,189), (222,239), (269,290)]
for i, (s, e) in enumerate(tm_maize):
    ax2.barh(1, e-s, left=s, height=0.5, color='#FF5722', alpha=0.9, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    ax2.text((s+e)/2, 0.3, f'TM{i+1}', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6, rotation=90)

# PGG domains
ax2.barh(2.2, 107, left=50, height=0.3, color='#2196F3', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='blue')
ax2.text(103, 2.2, 'PGG domain 1', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='blue')
ax2.barh(2.2, 77, left=217, height=0.3, color='#2196F3', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='blue')
ax2.text(255, 2.2, 'PGG domain 2', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='blue')

# C-terminal region
ax2.barh(1, 80, left=295, height=0.5, color='#E1BEE7', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(335, 1, 'C-term', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)

ax2.set_yticks([])
ax2.set_xlabel('Residue position')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#4CAF50', alpha=0.7, label='Ankyrin repeats'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FF5722', alpha=0.9, label='TM helices'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#2196F3', alpha=0.5, label='PGG domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FFE0B2', alpha=0.7, label='Disordered'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='lightgray', label='Uncharacterized regions'),
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=5, fontsize=9, bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('domain_architecture_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Domain architecture comparison saved.")
